title: Linus's Vibranium
description: A small mod that adds a material called Vibranium.
body: A small mod that adds a material called Vibranium as well as a pickaxe. The pickaxe can instant mine stone at base speed and can instant mine deepslate with efficiency 5 and haste 2. I just threw this mod together because I wanted to have a way to instant mine deepslate. Enjoy!
